Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Forged madra]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Forged madra can form dense structures like steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin deflected a spike of Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Forged madra can be used to create extremely stable barriers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 12''' — Forged madra and dead matter must be handled differently by a Soulsmith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — A shining bar of Forged madra was found in a wardrobe.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Forged madra can be used to create mechanical limbs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Forged madra can be a chaotic blend of colors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Forged madra has seven basic aspects and combinations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Forged madra can exist in different forms such as liquid, sludge, pebbles, or glass-like shards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Forged madra has a destruction aura.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — The walls of Akura clan territory are made of black Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — He caught a glimpse of the glowing mass of Forged madra at the heart of the cloud construct before it dissipated into essence.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Mercy uses dark green Forged madra to create a tent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin has Forged madra limbs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 17''' — The tent's dark green madra is Forged madra.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Fisher Gesha has purple spider-legs made of Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — King Dakata uses Forged madra.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon possesses Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan can manifest blue-white stars of Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 16''' — Forged madra can be used to sheath Wavedancer.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Forged madra exists in the form of stars floating in the Twilight Room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Blacksword uses Forged madra in his attacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Calan Archer's first Divine Treasure produces a white eye of Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — A majestic golden serpent crafted from powerful madra whipped up a sandstorm of Forged madra.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — The pouch of scripted purple cloth compresses Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The Heaven’s Glory barrier was partially made of Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Forged madra can be used to create transparent panes of glass-like coverings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Forged madra panes burn like live coals when broken.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — A brick of brown Forged madra was used as a weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The light of Samara's ring was Forged madra.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Forged madra can manifest as strands that web up a room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Forged madra is present below Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Forged madra can be used to create hands.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — Forged madra can be used to generate crystalline walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Forged madra can be used to create temporary shelters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Lindon's hand was gloved in Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 39''' — Lirin suspected the ice produced in the bowl was Forged madra.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 1''' — Forged madra supports civilizations within the trees of the Forest Monarch's territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Forged madra was not used in the construction of the primitive castles.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
